questions.text: Which of these is a traditional method of water harvesting?
questions.explanation: Khadin is a traditional water harvesting system in Rajasthan. Tube wells, hand pumps, and dams are modern methods.

questions.text: Bishnoi community is known for conservation of forests.
questions.explanation: The Bishnoi community of Rajasthan is famous for their commitment to protecting trees and wildlife.

questions.text: What is the main benefit of water harvesting?
questions.correctAnswer: It helps conserve water and recharge groundwater.
questions.explanation: Water harvesting collects rainwater, reduces runoff, recharges groundwater, and provides water during dry periods.

questions.text: The Chipko movement was started by ________.
questions.explanation: The Chipko movement was started by Sunderlal Bahuguna and local villagers in Uttarakhand to protect trees.
